stages.name: stage_1_unsupervised
stages.description: Train Autoencoder and GANomaly on normal traffic.

stages.name: stage_5_stacking
stages.description: Train meta learner on validation predictions.

stages.name: stage_6_symbolic
stages.description: Apply symbolic rules and compute CLAF++ scores.

rule_summary.description: Elevated SYN-style error rates and repetitive connection pressure.
High service dispersion with low same-service continuity.
Repeated low-diversity traffic bursts suggestive of scripted probing.
Authentication failures and compromise indicators above normal profile.
